expected.notes: H-1B stage means track student rules do not apply; advisory_tax_filing_student targets F-1 students specifically and should not fire for H-1B holders.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'advisory_tax_filing_student', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  (no conditions)
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
